result.evidence_summary: Thorleif Haugs Minneløp is a real annual 50km cross-country ski race held since 1966 in Finnemarka, Norway, honoring Thorleif Haug, with listings on Ski Classics Challengers, official Hauern site with registration details, and mentions in ProXCskiing and Langrenn.com. It offers seeding to major races like Birken and Vasaloppet, with events scheduled for early February (e.g., 2025 and 2026). Social media links are referenced on ProXCskiing, confirming organized status.
